name: Spiced Tea
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsweetened lemon-flavored instant iced tea (dry)
recipeInstructions:
Mix all ingredients except boiling water; store in a tightly covered container at room temperature up to 1 week.
Pour boiling water over tea mixture and stir until dissolved. Garnish with lemon or orange slices if desired. Makes 16 servings, about 3/4 cup each; 35 calories per serving.
